name: Hakuyosha Company, Ltd.
summary: Hakuyosha Company, Ltd. engages in cleaning, rental, and other businesses in Japan. The company cleans general clothing items, fur, leather, shoes, difficult-to-handle kimono, and bags; and interior items, such as curtains, carpets, and futons, as well as offers house cleaning for including kitchens and bathrooms. It also rents uniforms to restaurants and factories; and linen, including sheets and towels, as well as tablecloths to restaurants. In addition, the company cleans theaters, halls, offices, and shops; and building exterior tiles, lighting fixtures, and carpets as well as provides pest control services. Hakuyosha Company, Ltd. was founded in 1906 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
